title: Genetic Stock Puckered-Leaf Groundnut Mutant ICGL 6
abstract:
ICGL 6 was isolated from a normal-leaved groundnut genotype OG 66-6-1 belonging to
Arachis hypogaea subsp. fastigiata var. vulgaris. A single plant with abnormally puckered
leaves was observed in a population of OG 66-6-1 grown in the 1979/80 postrainy season at
ICRISAT Center. The plant was harvested and progeny rowed. Subsequently plants with
puckered leaves were reselected in successive selfed generations, until their leaf phenotype
was stabilized.
